creator: bsdkaffee@gmail.com
text:
It has been a long time since this port was submitted.  I have attached a new shar for the last available release.

--- 2008-06-06-kirocker.shar begins here ---
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	kirocker
#	kirocker/Makefile
#	kirocker/distinfo
#	kirocker/pkg-descr
#	kirocker/pkg-plist
#
echo c - kirocker
mkdir -p kirocker > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - kirocker/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >kirocker/Makefile << 'END-of-kirocker/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	kirocker
X# Date created:				09 August 2007
X# Whom:					Jason E. Hale <bsdkaffee@gmail.com>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	kirocker
XPORTVERSION=	4.0
XCATEGORIES=	audio kde
XMASTER_SITES=	http://slaout.linux62.org/kirocker/downloads/ \
X		http://contrib.pardus.org.tr/archives/ \
X		http://darkstar.ist.utl.pt/slackware/addon/slacky/slackware-12.0/multimedia/kirocker/4.0/src/ \
X		http://repository.slacky.eu/slackware-12.0/multimedia/kirocker/4.0/src/
X
XMAINTAINER=	bsdkaffee@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=	Kicker applet for displaying Amarok info
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=	amarok:${PORTSDIR}/audio/amarok
X
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XUSE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool:15
XUSE_KDELIBS_VER=3
XINSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
X
XKCONFIG_COMP=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/kconfig_compiler
XUIC=		${LOCALBASE}/bin/uic
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
Xpost-extract:
X.for i in exportadvises framechooser themechooser themeeditor themeexporter
X	cd ${WRKSRC}/src && ${UIC} -o $i.h $i.ui
X.endfor
X	cd ${WRKSRC}/src && ${KCONFIG_COMP} kirocker.kcfg settings.kcfgc
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-kirocker/Makefile
echo x - kirocker/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >kirocker/distinfo << 'END-of-kirocker/distinfo'
XMD5 (kirocker-4.0.tar.gz) = b7d144caed8a43b7155cf24703d7c456
XSHA256 (kirocker-4.0.tar.gz) = 485ba190463594010000a4d7c7ce6cec560258cd528775811523059f01eaa0b9
XSIZE (kirocker-4.0.tar.gz) = 7408190
END-of-kirocker/distinfo
echo x - kirocker/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >kirocker/pkg-descr << 'END-of-kirocker/pkg-descr'
XKirocker Music Display is a KDE Kicker applet for Amarok that displays the
Xcurrent song information and allows for basic playback control and song rating.
XA stand-alone fullscreen mode is also included that offers the same
Xfunctionality.
X
XWWW: http://www.kde-apps.org/content/show.php?content=52869
END-of-kirocker/pkg-descr
echo x - kirocker/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >kirocker/pkg-plist << 'END-of-kirocker/pkg-plist'
